changes.text: Added daily focus-streak badge on dashboard utilizing Room database.
changes.details: The dashboard now pulls the active focus streak directly from the Room database, keeping track of consecutive days the user has completed focus sessions without breaking the chain.

changes.text: Merged SettingsDialog and SettingsScreen into a unified configuration manager utilizing QSViewModel.
changes.details: Migrated from duplicated settings elements to a single unified view ensuring consistency across layout and functionality, managed effectively by QSViewModel.

changes.text: Created interactive FocusHistoryScreen with Recharts-inspired rendering for session durations.
changes.details: Added a new full-screen graph showing the session durations with smooth transitions and an aesthetic matching the Nothing OS style.

changes.text: Implemented Room database setup for Automation rules and Focus sessions.
changes.details: Created DAOs and database instances locally to ensure data persists offline.

changes.text: Added Nothing style animated switch toggles.
changes.details: Replaced standard Material switches with custom-designed switch components offering satisfying snap animations.

changes.text: Refactored QSViewModel for better state synchronization.
changes.details: Improved the internal data flow between the view model and the UI components, preventing race conditions during rapid state changes.
Users can now trigger a system-level overlay to block out distractions while using the Focus mode timer.

changes.text: Optimized app footprint and build configuration.
changes.details: Trimmed down unused dependencies to reduce the APK size by roughly 15% and improve startup time.
Added monochrome styled widgets mirroring the brand design language.

changes.text: Resolved quick setting drag and drop jitter.
changes.details: Addressed a rendering issue during the drag-and-drop actions on quick settings tiles that caused random skipping.

changes.text: Minor performance improvements in Background services.
changes.details: Cleaned up the coroutine scope management to prevent memory leaks.
First stable launch of the application with core features.
Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Data, and simple toggles are fully operational and testable.
Draggable sliders for system adjustments added to the main interface.
